rows.label: qev042201_MSG0001
rows.name:
When the spirits appear, it is
proof that our Nopon roots have
taken hold in the earth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0002
rows.name:
Shinshin saw it, mo... The highest-ranking
existence among the spirits... The
incarnation of the Divine Nopopon...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire about Nopopon

rows.label: qev042201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Shinshin what the Divine Nopopon is.

rows.label: qev042201_JNK0020
rows.name: Inquire about Location

rows.label: qev042201_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask where Shinshin spotted
this incarnation.

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0003
rows.name:
O, spirit, please forgive the
blasphemy of this person, mo...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Mind your tongue and amend your ways...
Or else the hammer of the all-seeing
spirit shall strike you down...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0005
rows.name:
If you say reckless things, it will reach
the ears of the Divine Nopopon, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0006
rows.name:
The Divine Nopopon is like a
guardian deity of the Nopon, born
in places where Nopon settle, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0007
rows.name:
Because this land of Mira has finally been
recognized as a place where Nopon live, the
incarnation of the Divine Nopopon has appeared, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0008
rows.name:
Shinshin saw the incarnation of
the Divine Nopopon while walking
through the Nightglow Forest, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0009
rows.name:
A blue meteor, a golden flame...
The spirit's form is a miracle
that illuminates the world...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0010
rows.name:
That sparkling figure was
incredibly mystical, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Shinshin was unable to see the true
form of the Divine Nopopon, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0012
rows.name:
To lay eyes upon the true body
of the spirit... is reserved
only for a true hero...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0013
rows.name:
It is so difficult to see its true
form that such a legend exists, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_JNK0030
rows.name: Inquire about Seeing It

rows.label: qev042201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask what you must do to see it.

rows.label: qev042201_JNK0040
rows.name: Inquire about Heropons

rows.label: qev042201_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask what constitutes a true hero.

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0014
rows.name:
You simply have to defeat the
incarnation of the Divine Nopopon, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Did you just think "Oh, that's
easy"? You should rethink that, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0016
rows.name:
It is said that the spirit's incarnation
takes on a form with the power to
dominate surrounding creatures, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0017
rows.name:
Which means, it will be the strongest
entity you have encountered so far, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0018
rows.name:
It refers to someone who can challenge it with
all their gathered skills and a spirit that
will not yield to any strong opponent, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0019
rows.name:
No matter how much your heart
burns... if your skills do not
match it, you will die, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0020
rows.name:
Shinshin is interested in the
"immense power" said to be granted
by the Divine Nopopon, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0021
rows.name:
...That being said, it is not that
I want the power for myself, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0022
rows.name:
I simply want to see with my own
eyes what that power is, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0023
rows.name:
Do you have the confidence to
overcome the spirit's incarnation
and obtain that "immense power," mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0024
rows.name: I have heard a good answer, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0025
rows.name:
Shinshin saw the Divine Nopopon
at the Whale's Tear Duct in
the Nightglow Forest, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0026
rows.name:
It looks like a Cervus, but that
is merely a temporary form, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0027
rows.name:
...Please, do not throw
your life away, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0028
rows.name:
Shinshin saw the Divine Nopopon
at the Whale's Tear Duct in
the Nightglow Forest, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0029
rows.name:
It looks like a Cervus, but that
is merely a temporary form, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0030
rows.name:
...Please, do not throw
your life away, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0034
rows.name:
Wow... Is that... the sword of
the spirits...! I can see the
miracle of the Nopopon, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0035
rows.name:
"It looks exactly like a toy..."
Anyone who says that is an idiot, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0036
rows.name:
You should equip it more and more,
mo! It is surely the ultimate weapon
meant to vanquish all evil, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042201_MSG0037
rows.name:
I am grateful to have seen it while
Shinshin is still alive, mo...![ST:wait ]
